creator: elofu17@hotmail.com
text:
No, the port gets built, but somewhere, probably during the configure stage, a Bus error is generated.

The strange thing is that it only happens in the 9.3 amd64 build jail.


Oh well, 9.3 is soon EOL...

I just wanted you to know, since "Bus error (core dumped)" doesn't look good in the logs. :)
